center.name: 德意志湾
center.summary: 德意志湾是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括红喉潜鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: More than 4,400 spend the winter in a loose concentration on the eastern part of the German Bight, for example. Unlike other loons, it regularly uses very small freshwater lakes as breeding sites
